productDisplayName: Puma Men Striped LS Polo Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black and grey striped polo neck t-shirt with white accents made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves, a ribbed collar, branding on left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This t-shirt from puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This stylish piece is an off-duty must have, pair it with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on model of height 6', shoulders 18"
